# Version 3.119.1
> **Servicing update with Metal and Xaml canvas fixes** · Released September 12, 2025 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.1)
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.1 is a servicing release fixing Metal disposal, iOS 15 compatibility, SKXamlCanvas issues and adding SKTypeface.PostScriptName. It also lands zlib 1.3.0.1+, hardens the Windows binaries by splitting EGL and building the WinUI interop with static CRT, and picks up a handful of community fixes.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **zlib bumped to 1.3.0.1+** — Refreshes the bundled zlib to pick up upstream fixes. ([#3058](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3058))

## API Surface

- **SKTypeface.PostScriptName** — Exposes the underlying PostScript font name so callers can identify the exact font instance a typeface resolves to. — ❤️ [@jonlipsky](https://github.com/jonlipsky) ([#3263](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3263))

## Bug Fixes

- **Metal on iOS 15 and lower no longer crashes** — Hotfix for a Metal backend regression that broke rendering on iOS versions before iOS 16. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3293](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3293))
- **Metal SKMetalView disposal and re-initialization corrected** — Avoids initializing `SKMetalView` twice and confirms that disposing `GRContext` on the Metal backend no longer crashes. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#3256](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3256), [#3258](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3258))
- **SKAutoCanvasRestore survives a disposed canvas** — `SKAutoCanvasRestore.Dispose` no longer crashes when the underlying canvas has already been disposed. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3291](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3291))
- **SKXamlCanvas is transparent on Mac Catalyst** — Ensures `SKXamlCanvas` is not opaque on Mac Catalyst so overlays and translucent content render correctly. — ❤️ [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3236](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3236))
- **UTC DateTime conversion corrected** — Fixes a UTC/local time-zone bug in date-time conversion inside the bindings. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#3333](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3333))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Windows native binaries hardened** — Builds EGL as Win32 and GLESv2 for the Windows App SDK, and builds the WinUI interop with `/MT` (static CRT) so the binaries have fewer runtime dependencies. ([#3338](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3338), [#3341](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3341))

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

## Preview 1 (September 4, 2025)

Preview 1 rolled up every 3.119.1 change — the Metal disposal and iOS 15 hotfixes, the `SKAutoCanvasRestore`, `SKXamlCanvas` Mac Catalyst and UTC `DateTime` fixes, the new `SKTypeface.PostScriptName` API, and the zlib and Windows binary hardening — and cut the release candidate.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.0...v3.119.1-preview.1.1)
